perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female creator in a white lace dress stands outdoors in front of a white wall with 'THE HOME CELEBRATION' text, gesturing excitedly toward a giant pink plate prop. (2) Scene shifts to an indoor event space with pink curtains where a male designer, Gustaf Westman, speaks at a podium; the creator is seen clinking glasses with others and holding a red flower-shaped candle holder. (3) The creator presents a series of design objects: a green and pink coffee cup set, a ring-shaped pink lamp, and a large metal spiral vase, using playful facial expressions and hand gestures to emphasize their features. (4) The video concludes with the creator waving goodbye in front of the event wall while holding a wine glass.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts alongside a high-pitched, energetic female voice speaking Mandarin. (2) A brief segment of a male voice says 'Hello Taiwan' followed by the sound of a crowd laughing and clapping. (3) The female narration continues continuously over the music, punctuated by 'ding' and 'sparkle' sound effects when new products are shown. (4) The music maintains its high tempo until the very end, where it fades out as the female voice says a final goodbye.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '波浪鏡跟胖胖杯盤' (Wavy mirror and chunky cup/plate) - Decorative hook text. (2) '瑞典設計師 Gustaf Westman' (Swedish designer Gustaf Westman) - Functional identification text. (3) 'IKEA x Gustaf Westman 聯名了' (IKEA x Gustaf Westman collaboration) - Functional announcement. (4) '前三名' (Top 3) and '第一名' (No. 1) - Structural markers for the review. (5) '台灣限量上市 10/16' (Limited release in Taiwan on 10/16) - Call-to-action/Information.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Event Highlight -> Top 3 Product Review -> Release Info & Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 featured male designer, approximately 6 background guests and staff members.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair tied back, wearing a white lace tank top dress and a black crossbody bag with a blue pom-pom.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor area with a white paneled wall and branding for IKEA; an indoor exhibition hall decorated with heavy pink velvet curtains, pink tablecloths, and various colorful designer home goods.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting and natural daylight.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Event Intro -> Product Ranking -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the IKEA x Gustaf Westman collaborative furniture and home decor collection in the Taiwan market. The video leverages social proof (referencing Blackpink's Rosé) and a personal recommendation format (Top 3) to build consumer desire and provides specific release dates to drive foot traffic.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is attending an official brand event, showcasing products directly to the camera, and providing the specific release date for the collection.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced editing with colorful variety-show style captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video successfully bridges high-end designer appeal with mass-market accessibility by highlighting the 'affordable' nature of the IKEA collaboration.
